mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT '-1' AS PARENT_AUTH_GROUP_ID, 'ROOT' AS AUTH_GROUP_ID, '코드그룹 모음' AS AUTH_GROUP_NAME, 1 AS LOAD_ON_DEMAND FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'ROOT' AS PARENT_AUTH_GROUP_ID, AUTH_GROUP_ID, AUTH_GROUP_NAME || '(' || auth_group_id || ')' AS AUTH_GROUP_NAME, 0 AS LOAD_ON_DEMAND FROM CMS_AUTH_GROUP ) CONNECT BY PRIOR AUTH_GROUP_ID = PARENT_AUTH_GROUP_ID START WITH AUTH_GROUP_ID = 'ROOT' ORDER SIBLINGS BY AUTH_GROUP_NAME
SELECT AUTH_GROUP_ID, AUTH_GROUP_NAME, REMARK, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID FROM CMS_AUTH_GROUP WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{auth_group_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_AUTH_GROUP SET AUTH_GROUP_NAME = #{auth_group_name}, REMARK = #{remark}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, MOD_ID = #{mod_id} WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{auth_group_id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CMS_AUTH WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID > 100 AND AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{auth_group_id}
SELECT AUTH_GROUP_ID, AUTH_ID, AUTH_NAME, USE_YN, REMARK, PRINT_SEQ, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID FROM CMS_AUTH WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{auth_group_id} ORDER BY PRINT_SEQ ASC
SELECT AUTH_GROUP_ID, AUTH_ID, AUTH_NAME, USE_YN, REMARK, PRINT_SEQ, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID FROM CMS_AUTH WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{auth_group_id} AND AUTH_ID = #{auth_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_AUTH SET AUTH_NAME = #{auth_name}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, REMARK = #{remark}, PRINT_SEQ = #{print_seq}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, MOD_ID = #{mod_id} WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{auth_group_id} AND AUTH_ID = #{auth_id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CMS_AUTH WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{auth_group_id} AND AUTH_ID = #{auth_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT B.AUTH_GROUP_ID, B.AUTH_GROUP_NAME, A.AUTH_ID, A.AUTH_NAME FROM CMS_AUTH A, CMS_AUTH_GROUP B WHERE A.AUTH_GROUP_ID = B.AUTH_GROUP_ID AND
A.AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{auth_group_id} AND
A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_NUMBER(A.AUTH_ID) > 200 ORDER BY B.AUTH_GROUP_ID, A.AUTH_ID
SELECT NVL(MAX(print_seq), 0) + 10 FROM CMS_AUTH WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{auth_group_id}
